mapper.sql: d.id, d.serial_number, d.mac_address, d.model_id, d.firmware_version, d.project_id, d.phase_id, d.site_name, d.install_location, d.status, d.warehouse_id, d.agent_company_id, d.config_file_url, d.config_version, d.install_date, d.online_date, d.installer_id, d.remark, d.version, d.create_time, d.update_time, m.model_name, m.model_code, p.project_name, p.project_code, w.warehouse_name
mapper.select: SELECT FROM device_instance d LEFT JOIN device_model m ON m.id = d.model_id AND m.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN project p ON p.id = d.project_id AND p.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN warehouse w ON w.id = d.warehouse_id AND w.deleted = 0 WHERE d.id = #{id} AND d.deleted = 0

SELECT id, device_id AS deviceId, from_status AS fromStatus, to_status AS toStatus, operator_id AS operatorId, remark, create_time AS createTime FROM device_status_log WHERE deleted = 0 AND device_id = #{deviceId} ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC
SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM device_instance WHERE deleted = 0 AND project_id = #{projectId} GROUP BY status
